title: queltia serotina
intro: Queltia serotina, also known as black cohosh, is a flowering plant native to North America, belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, black cohosh has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which are thought to alleviate menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety. The health benefits of black cohosh are attributed to its ability to reduce hot flashes, improve sleep quality, and regulate hormonal imbalances. Black cohosh is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is commonly used in herbal medicine to promote women's health and well-being.
